_note: Round 2 (one more generation back) for batch e_1400_1750_1: 32 round-1 spouse-parents (late-medieval/early-modern, 1400-1750) given their documented parents + full siblings. All 32 filled — no skips; this era is extremely well documented. New nodes use the R2I_ prefix. MAJOR DEDUP/CROSS-LINKS found by grepping existing additions before writing: (1) Richard Neville, 5th Earl of Salisbury -> parents are the EXISTING RALPHNEV + JOANBEAU (already parents of Cecily Neville/CN); (2) Eleanor of Aragon, Queen of Portugal -> parents are the EXISTING FERDIARAGON + ELEANORALB (already parents of JOHNIIARAGON); (3) Marguerite of Orleans, Countess of Vertus -> parents are the EXISTING SPJ_LOUIS1ORLEANS + SPJ_VALENTINAVISCONTI (already parents of CHARLESORLEANS/SPJ_JOHNANGOULEME); (4) Agnes of Burgundy -> parents are the EXISTING SPJ_JOHNFEARLESS + SPJ_MARGARETBAVARIA (already parents of PHILIPGOOD/SPJ_ANNEBURGUNDY); (5) Catherine of Cleves -> parents are the EXISTING SPI_ADOLPH1_CLEVES + SPI_MARIE_BURGUNDY_CLEVES (already parents of MARIECLEVES); (6) Eleanor of Navarre -> parents are the EXISTING JOHNIIARAGON + BLANCHENAV (already parents of CHARLESVIANA); (7) Isabel le Despenser's mother is Constance of York, who ALREADY EXISTS as R2H_CONSTANCEOFYORK (created in 41_grandparents_d5.json as EOL's daughter) — referenced, not duplicated; (8) Alice Montagu's mother Eleanor Holland is textually confusable with her ELDER SISTER of the identical name (R2H_ELEANORHOLLAND, m. Roger Mortimer, already in d5) — Wikipedia's 'Eleanor Holland' article explicitly warns these are two different daughters of Thomas Holland, 2nd Earl of Kent; Alice's actual mother is a NEW distinct node (R2I_ELEANORHOLLAND_SALISBURY) added as an ADDITIONAL child of the EXISTING R2H_THOMASHOLLAND2KENT + R2H_ALICEFITZALAN union rather than re-creating that grandparent generation; (9) Peter II of Luxembourg's father Louis de Luxembourg, Count of Saint-Pol, is added as a NEW additional child of the EXISTING PETERLUX + MARGBAUX union (already parents of Jacquetta of Luxembourg/JL, Duchess of Bedford, mother of Elizabeth Woodville) — Peter II is thus a documented nephew of Jacquetta; (10) Charles I of Bourbon + Agnes of Burgundy's EXISTING union (from 40_spouseparents_u2.json, already parents of ISABBOURBON/John II/Peter II Beaujeu) gains two more documented daughters, Margaret of Bourbon (Duchess of Savoy) and Catherine of Bourbon (Duchess of Guelders) — both round-1 ids in this same batch; (11) Philip II of Savoy and Margaret of Savoy (Countess of Saint-Pol) — both round-1 ids in this batch — share the same parents, Louis, Duke of Savoy & Anne of Cyprus, so one family entry resolves both; (12) Arnold, Duke of Guelders + Catherine of Cleves's EXISTING union (from 40_spouseparents_u4.json, already parents of MARYGUELDERS/SPJ_ADOLFGUELDERS) gains full siblings incl. this batch's SPI_ADOLF_GUELDERS — FLAGGING a pre-existing round-1 DATA DUPLICATE: SPJ_ADOLFGUELDERS (u4) and SPI_ADOLF_GUELDERS (u3) are the same historical person (Adolf of Egmond, Duke of Guelders, 1438-1477) created independently under two ids in two different round-1 files; not resolved here (no edits to other files permitted), left for a future dedup pass. DISPUTE FLAG: Jofré Llançol i Escrivà's paternal line (Llançol vs Borja) is flagged as debated in his own round-1 label; Wikipedia nonetheless names his parents as Rodrigo Gil de Borja y Fenollet & Sibília de Escrivà y Pròixita, which is given here as the standard/documented answer while preserving the existing dispute flag. Sources are Wikipedia/standard genealogies (Verified 2026-07-17). 👑 = regnant sovereigns only.

families.note: Richard Neville, 5th Earl of Salisbury, is documented son of Ralph Neville, Earl of Westmorland, & Joan Beaufort — half-blood brother (same union) of the existing Cecily Neville (CN), Duchess of York. Wikipedia.

Only child. Wikipedia.

Full brother Alfonso V and full sister Maria (queen of the existing JOHNIICAST) added. Wikipedia.

Marguerite of Orleans, Countess of Vertus, is documented daughter of Louis I, Duke of Orleans, & Valentina Visconti — full sister of the existing Charles, Duke of Orleans (CHARLESORLEANS) & John of Angouleme (SPJ_JOHNANGOULEME). Wikipedia.

Agnes of Burgundy (wife of Charles I of Bourbon) is documented daughter of John the Fearless & Margaret of Bavaria — full sister of the existing Philip the Good (PHILIPGOOD) & Anne of Burgundy (SPJ_ANNEBURGUNDY). Wikipedia.
